temples.name: Nagdevta Temple
temples.description: A serene temple dedicated to Lord Shiva, nestled in the beautiful hills of Kunda, Tehri Garhwal. This ancient temple holds great spiritual significance for the local community.

pradhanProfile.name: Pyarelal Nautiyal
pradhanProfile.desc1: A dedicated village leader committed to the development of Kunda Gram Panchayat and the preservation of Nagdevta Temple's spiritual heritage.
pradhanProfile.desc2: Successfully led multiple initiatives including temple renovation, road development, and community welfare programs benefiting over 500 families.
pradhanProfile.desc3: Together we will preserve our cultural heritage and ensure the temple remains a beacon of faith for generations to come.
